name: "🔒 Security Vulnerability Report"
about: "Report a security vulnerability in a smart contract or service"

labels: ["security"]
assignees: ["FuzzysTodd"]
---

> ⚠️ **IMPORTANT**: For critical vulnerabilities (funds at risk), please email
> directly rather than opening a public issue.
> See `SECURITY.md` for the responsible disclosure process.

## Affected Component
<!-- Which contract, file, or service is affected? -->
- Contract / File:
- Version / Commit:

## Vulnerability Type
- [ ] Reentrancy
- [ ] Access control bypass
- [ ] Integer overflow / underflow
- [ ] Oracle manipulation
- [ ] Front-running
- [ ] Signature replay
- [ ] Logic error
- [ ] Other:

## Severity (CVSS / SWC)
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — direct fund loss possible
- [ ] 🟠 High — significant fund/governance impact
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — limited impact with conditions
- [ ] 🟢 Low — informational or hardening improvement

## Description
<!-- Describe the vulnerability. Include function names, line numbers, and the
     attack vector. Do NOT include full exploit code in a public issue. -->


## Impact
<!-- What could an attacker achieve? Estimated funds at risk? -->


## Recommended Fix
<!-- Your suggested remediation, if any. -->


## Proof of Concept (private)
<!-- For critical issues, share PoC code privately via the contact in SECURITY.md.
     For low/medium: you may include a minimal test case here. -->
